positive: A stylized, high-contrast minimalist geometric scene featuring a bioluminescent tropical floral arrangement (orchid, monstera leaf, lily) seamlessly integrated with abstract, interlocking cyan and emerald geometric shapes. The composition should be centered and symmetrical, with the flora providing organic curves against the sharp, clean lines of the abstract art. Use a limited palette of deep jewel tones (sapphire, teal, amethyst) against a stark off-white or matte black background. The overall mood is mystical, sophisticated, and modern, designed for apparel printing. Clean silhouettes are paramount, ensuring strong negative space and clear definition of all elements. Vector art quality, graphic novel aesthetic, poster illustration, negative space art.
negative: low resolution, blurry, noise, smudge, grain, watermark, signature, text, cartoon, photorealism, poor anatomy, extra limbs, bad geometry, messy, cluttered, gradient blend, messy lines
